claims.statement: Seikan Tunnel length is at least 3× larger than Panama Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km. Panama Canal length: 82 km.

claims.statement: Peregrine falcon dive is faster than Elite sprinter top speed (approx.).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h. Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h.

claims.statement: Suez Canal length is shorter than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Suez Canal length: 193 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: There are more UN member states than squares on a chessboard.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 193 states vs 64 squares.

claims.statement: Penicillin discovered happened before Barcode first scanned.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Penicillin discovered: 1928. Barcode first scanned: 1974.
